coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities; 15 Leiden communities; pangenome PHR annotations
statistical_scope: Per-community counts; arms, genes, shared genes, specific genes, biotype percentages
copy_number_awareness: Counts community arms/genes but is not genome-wide copy-weighted ORA
use_decision: Use for v5 overview, biotype, C1/C4/C15, and community labels
caveat: Arm membership is not identical to CHM13 called interval availability; C5 chr6_p, C7 chr13_p, C14 chrY_q, and C15 chrY_p lack CHM13 called interval rows

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities; gene x community long table
statistical_scope: Arms in community, samples in community, total arms, total samples, enrichment ratio, specificity
copy_number_awareness: Support-aware pangenome/community table; not genome-wide copy-weighted ORA
use_decision: Use for OR4F, IQSEC3, GTPBP6, DDX11L, WASH, FAM138, RPL23A, SHOX support
caveat: Do not interpret enrichment_ratio as validated GO/ORA enrichment; it is an arm-presence/support measure

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities; gene-family rollups
statistical_scope: Family counts by community: annotations, unique genes, arms, example genes
copy_number_awareness: Annotation/support-aware family table; not genome-wide copy-weighted ORA
use_decision: Use for OR, RPL, SEPTIN, DDX11L, WASH, FAM138, MTCO family panels
caveat: Family labels are regex-derived in analyze-community-enrichments.R; keep labels qualitative

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level community-family table
statistical_scope: 116 Fisher exact tests; BH-adjusted; all significant=FALSE
copy_number_awareness: Not copy-weighted; arm-level Fisher over family presence
use_decision: Use to state no family-community signal survives BH correction
caveat: Do not call OR, MTCO, DUX4L, or other family rows statistically significant after multiple testing

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities
statistical_scope: Genes specific to one community; arms_in_comm and total_arms
copy_number_awareness: Support-aware by arm; not genome-wide copy-weighted ORA
use_decision: Use for DUX4L C1, MTCO C7, SHOX/GTPBP6 C15 callouts
caveat: Community-specific means specific within this HPRCv2 community analysis, not necessarily unique in the whole genome

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities
statistical_scope: Cross-community gene sharing; n_communities and n_arms
copy_number_awareness: Support-aware by community/arm; not genome-wide copy-weighted ORA
use_decision: Use for duplicon backbone signals such as RPL23AP45, SEPTIN14P22, DDX11L16, FAM138D, WASH6P
caveat: These are presence/hub signals, not enriched GO terms

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities; TAR1 repeat annotations
statistical_scope: TAR1 prevalence, mean count, mean length per community
copy_number_awareness: Repeat copy/count aware; not gene enrichment or ORA
use_decision: Use only as context for TAR1/passenger/repeat landscape and C2 high mean TAR1 count
caveat: TAR1 is not a gene-enrichment signal; do not mix with GO/gene-family enrichment claims

coordinate_scope: HPRCv2 arm-level communities; per-arm TAR1 repeat annotations
